textPlain: Sorry I only know the spanish community. But the last years, the gamebooks (spanish) have been revival with a lot complex and interesting things.For example loops, like as Groundhog Day (film), the book is https://www.puntodeheroe.com/elbucle.htmlOr open worlds, like as modern RPG or GTA, the book is https://jose-tamayo.itch.io/la-leyenda-okiri .Or Elite like gamebooks, the book https://sites.google.com/view/spacegom/inicio .Plus, there are other new mechanics in other gamebooks.
I am curious about other mechanics. Can you tell us more about what kind ? Could you point us towards some resource on this ?
